triggers.name: Enemy timer: Blinding Luminance
triggers.pattern: ^You begin casting Blinding Luminance\.$
triggers.comments: ~0m24s at level 50 (formula 1, cap 4 ticks); DoT/debuff; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Cleric level 34. v1 keys enemy timers by spell name only — two mobs under the same spell share one bar.

triggers.name: Enemy timer cleared: Blinding Luminance
triggers.pattern: ^Your Blinding Luminance spell has worn off(?: of (.+))?\.$
triggers.comments: Cancels the cast-start countdown early (mez break, mob death) and re-announces on the overlay. Overlay text only — curated packs own the spoken wear-offs.
